0.q: The expression pattern of ROS-related genes (MnSOD, POD, and CAT1) encoding antioxidant enzymes involved in ROS scavenging was analyzed... transgenic plants overexpressing LmSAP and LmSAPΔAN1 constructs exhibited higher tolerance to salt and osmotic stresses

Transgenic tobacco seedlings showed higher survival rates and antioxidant activities under salt and ionic stresses. Enhanced antioxidant activities paralleled lower malondialdehyde and superoxide anion O2 levels in the LmSAP transgenic seedlings.

1.q: LmTrxh2 overexpression could alleviate membrane damage by enhancing the free radical scavenging ability of tobacco...LmTrxh2 could be a key regulator gene that may be found upstream of some ROS-related genes.
